description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows builds (basic) that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to run on different Windows environments (2019 and 2022), platforms (Win32 and x64), build types (Debug and Release), and C++ standards (14 and 17). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, configure a CMake build in a build directory, build tests in parallel, and run tests with CTest, outputting test failures.
